Set Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem Credentials

cdse_set_credentials.Rd

Reads AWS credentials from the standard AWS credentials file (~/.aws/credentials) for a specific profile (defaulting to "copernicus").

Usage

cdse_set_credentials(profile = "copernicus", file = "~/.aws/credentials")

Arguments

profile

Character. The name of the profile to read from the credentials file. Defaults to "copernicus".

file

Character. Path to the AWS credentials file. Defaults to "~/.aws/credentials".

Value

A named list containing access_key and secret_key, or NULL if not found.
